title: Marcus and the Lost Duckling
synopsis: Marcus, a kind young boy, discovers a scared little duckling separated from its family at the pond. With gentle care and determination, he helps the lost duckling find its way back to its mama duck, learning about kindness and helping others along the way.

pages.text: Marcus walked to the pond with his mama. He loved watching the ducks swim and splash. The sun made the water sparkle like diamonds.

illustration.description: A cheerful Black boy with short curly hair wearing a bright red t-shirt and blue shorts walks hand-in-hand with his mother, a woman with natural hair in a yellow sundress, toward a sparkling pond. The scene is set in a sunny park with green grass and trees in the background. The illustration uses bright, cheerful cartoon style with bold primary colors and rounded, friendly shapes.
illustration.alt: Marcus and his mama walking to the pond

pages.text: But wait! Marcus heard a tiny, sad sound. Peep! Peep! A little yellow duckling sat all alone by the water. It looked scared and lost.

illustration.description: A small, fluffy yellow duckling sits alone on the grassy bank of a pond, looking sad with droopy eyes and slightly ruffled feathers. Marcus stands nearby, bending down with a concerned expression on his face. The pond has lily pads and cattails, with other ducks visible in the distance. The mood conveys gentle concern and empathy.
illustration.alt: A sad, lost duckling by the pond with Marcus watching

pages.text: Marcus felt worried for the little duckling. 'Don't be scared,' he said softly. 'I will help you find your mama.' The duckling looked up with hopeful eyes.

illustration.description: Marcus kneels down close to the yellow duckling, speaking gently with a kind, reassuring expression. His hand is extended in a non-threatening gesture. The duckling looks up at him with big, round eyes that show a mix of fear and hope. Soft morning light filters through the scene, creating a warm, comforting atmosphere with pastel yellows and greens.

pages.text: Marcus was brave. He looked around the pond carefully. Where could mama duck be? He saw other families of ducks swimming far away across the water.

illustration.description: Marcus stands confidently with his hand shading his eyes, scanning the pond with determination. In the background, several duck families swim together - a diverse mix including mallards and white ducks with ducklings following behind. The composition shows Marcus in the foreground looking brave and focused, with the pond stretching out behind him under a bright blue sky.
illustration.alt: Marcus searching for the duckling's family

pages.text: The duckling waddled close to Marcus. Together, they walked along the pond's edge. Marcus called out, 'Mama duck! Your baby is here!'

illustration.description: Marcus walks slowly along the pond's grassy edge with the yellow duckling waddling right beside him, staying close to his feet. Marcus has one hand cupped around his mouth as he calls out, while looking across the water. The scene shows their friendship forming, with warm golden light reflecting off the water and cattails swaying gently in the breeze.
illustration.alt: Marcus and the duckling walking together along the pond

pages.text: Suddenly, they heard a loud 'QUACK!' A mama duck came swimming fast across the pond. She looked so happy to see her baby!

illustration.description: A large brown mama duck swims quickly through the water toward shore, creating ripples and splashes around her. Her wings are slightly spread and her expression shows urgent joy and relief. Marcus and the little duckling wait at the water's edge, both looking excited. The scene captures the moment of reunion with dynamic movement lines showing the mama duck's speed through the bright blue water.
illustration.alt: Mama duck swimming quickly toward her lost baby

pages.text: The little duckling ran to its mama and they hugged with their wings. Marcus felt so happy inside. He had helped them find each other!

illustration.description: The yellow duckling and brown mama duck embrace at the water's edge, their wings wrapped around each other in a loving hug. Marcus watches with a huge, joyful smile on his face, his hands clasped together with delight. Sparkles and heart shapes float around the reunited duck family. The scene radiates warmth and happiness with bright, celebratory colors and a golden, magical glow.
illustration.alt: The duckling and mama duck hugging while Marcus watches happily

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Marcus feel when he saw the lost duckling?
questions.explanation: Marcus felt worried because the duckling looked scared and lost.

questions.question: What did Marcus do to help find mama duck?
choices: He called out for mama duck
questions.explanation: Marcus walked around the pond calling 'Mama duck! Your baby is here!'

questions.question: How did mama duck and her baby feel when they found each other?
questions.explanation: They felt happy and hugged each other with their wings.

questions.question: What did Marcus learn in this story?
questions.explanation: Marcus learned how good it feels to help others when he helped the duckling find its mama.

sentences.text: Marcus heard a tiny, ___ sound from the duckling.
Marcus was ___ and decided to help the duckling.
The mama duck came swimming ___ across the pond.
Marcus felt ___ when he helped the ducks find each other.
